caption: A man with a light-colored, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red and white patterned bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a stand, facing slightly to the left. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments. In the foreground, two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and another on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expression and slightly adjusting his head position and gaze. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, while his overall posture remains relatively stable throughout the clip.
